headline: How The Intuit (INTU) Narrative Is Shifting With AI Risks And Trimmed Valuation Targets
summary: Intuit’s fair value estimate has been trimmed slightly, with the central price target moving from US$610.16 to US$603.49 per share. That small reset is consistent with Street research that combines confidence in QuickBooks and TurboTax with more cautious views on AI risk, competition, and the implications of tax season and AI adoption. As you read on, you will see how these shifting signals fit together and what to watch as the Intuit story evolves. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture...

headline: Dow spikes by over 1,300, oil prices retreat in ceasefire rally
summary: All three of the major indexes (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) closed Wednesday's session with colossal gains — the Dow Jones Industrial Average skyrocketed by over 1,320 points (2.85%) and the Nasdaq Composite surged by nearly 620 points (2.8%) — after President Trump announced that Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire last night. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the trading day's biggest sector gainers.

headline: NetApp & Nutanix Partner to Advance Hybrid Cloud & Virtualization
summary: NTAP teams up with Nutanix to integrate ONTAP with NCP, aiming to streamline hybrid cloud, boost virtualization efficiency and enable seamless data mobility.
